# `BcdPrint`

**Systems:** C64, MEGA65, PLUS4, C128, VIC20, PET,  NES, OK64  
**Parameters:** `a,n`

***

<div markdown="0" class="trse-help-body">

<h3>BcdPrint( [address 1],[number] );</h3>
<ul>
<li>[address 1] - The address of the BCD number</li>
<li>[number] - The length of the BCD in bytes</li>
</ul>


<h3>Description</h3>
<p>
Prints the BCD number at the current screenaddress memory
location.
</p>


<h3>Example</h3>

<code>
var
    score: array[] of byte = ($12,$34,$56); // number is 563412

begin
    DefineScreen();
    screenmemory := screen_char_loc;

    BcdPrint( score, 3 );
    // displays 563412 on the screen

</code>


</div>
